meaning: n.娣℃按(涓嶆槸娴锋磱姘寸殑),婀栨按,鍐呮渤
examples: Marine and freshwater stickleback can hybridize in contact zones.
There are bright prospects for freshwater fish farming.
The Wildlife Park has plenty of freshwater crocodiles and saltwater crocodiles.
Contributions were drawn from the fields of hydrological sciences, freshwater policy, international basin management and operational water supply.
Sailing through this inlet reveals a huge freshwater lagoon, shimmering aqua green in the sun.
